general.tryAgain: Something went wrong. Please try again.
general.contactSupport: If the problem persists, please contact support
general.temporaryIssue: We're experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again later.

network.offline: You are currently offline. Please check your internet connection.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
network.requestFailed: Request failed. Please check your connection.
network.serverUnreachable: Unable to reach server. Please try again later.

authentication.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please login again.
authentication.tokenInvalid: Invalid authentication token. Please login again.
authentication.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action
authentication.accessDenied: Access denied. You don't have permission to access this resource.
authentication.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.

validation.invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check your data.
validation.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Please check your input.
validation.futureDate: Date cannot be in the future
validation.pastDate: Date cannot be in the past

server.internalError: Internal server error. Please try again later.
server.maintenance: Server is under maintenance. Please try again later.
server.badRequest: Bad request. Please check your input.
server.conflict: A conflict occurred. The resource already exists.
server.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this resource
server.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again later.

database.duplicateEntry: Duplicate entry. This record already exists.
database.foreignKeyConstraint: Cannot delete. This record is referenced by other records.

file.sizeTooLarge: File size is too large. Maximum allowed: {{max}}MB

form.updateFailed: Failed to update. Please try again.

booking.slotUnavailable: This time slot is no longer available
booking.alreadyBooked: You already have a booking at this time
booking.rescheduleUnavailable: Rescheduling is not available for this booking

case.accessDenied: You don't have access to this case
case.cannotClose: Cannot close case at this stage

lawyer.bookingClosed: Lawyer is not accepting bookings at the moment
